center.name: Wairau River
center.summary: The Wairau River is one of the longest rivers in New Zealand's South Island.

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |url=https://www.birdsnz.org.nz/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/Notornis_18_2.pdf |journal=Notornis |volume=18 |page=133 |via=Birds New Zealand.}} As of 2016, the black-fronted dotterel officially inhabits most of New Zealand, with some of their key breeding spots being the Wairau and the Awatere rivers
